one_time_description: Landfill remediation liability recognized during the year for a former closed landfill with estimated total remediation cost of $4,555,403
economic_notes: TteS operates multiple partnerships including Tk'emlupsemc Forestry Limited Partnership (forest licenses), Stk'emlupsemc Limited Partnership (mining royalties), and Secwepemcetkwe Limited Partnership (employment contract services). Government business enterprises include Kamloops Indian Band Development Corporation, Kamloops Indian Band Utility Corporation, and Tk'emlupsemc Forestry Development Corporation among others. Development cost charges reserve of $5,895,261. Net Smelter Fund of $4,129,014.
notes: Audit is qualified for two reasons: (1) management has not completed assessment of tangible capital assets for PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations, so the impact on expenses, surplus, TCA and accumulated surplus cannot be quantified; (2) certain GBEs and Government Business Partnerships use ASPE instead of IFRS as required by PSAS, impact on GBE investments and income cannot be determined. Consolidated subsidiaries include TteS Social Housing Section 95 Phases 1-13, Phases 14-20, and Spiyu7ullucw Ranch Corporation (non-coterminous fiscal year ending January 31). Nine GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis. Three partnerships also on modified equity basis. Landfill remediation of $4,555,403 expensed in year with $1,162,356 outstanding as liability. expenses_housing combines Housing ($3,249,074) and Social Housing ($1,010,860). total_government_transfers includes ISC ($17,922,027), Province of BC ($5,993,156), CMHC ($965,415), and Health Canada ($25,558).
